cards.title: Atop Switch Vuln
cards.summary: [P2] Atop Technologies EHG2408 series switch is vulnerable to a stack-based buffer overflow, with no patch available. This vulnerability has not been exploited in the wild yet. Why now: Newly disclosed vulnerability with no patch available (confidence: 0.80)

cards.title: Tenda FH1202 Vuln
cards.summary: [P2] Tenda FH1202 devices are vulnerable to multiple vulnerabilities, including CVE-2026-3810 and CVE-2026-3809, with no patches available. These vulnerabilities have not been exploited in the wild yet. Why now: Newly disclosed vulnerabilities with no patches available (confidence: 0.80)
